locator.quote: the binding ceiling is generalisation, not capacity

text: The binding ceiling is generalisation, not capacity — the optimal weight-space hyperplane is found early.

locator.quote: hit the same ceiling from opposite directions

text: C15 (more features) and C18 (more training) hit the same ceiling from opposite directions — both overfit held-out.
The 23-d input ceiling is data/signal, not architecture or feature expressiveness; adding derived features made generalisation strictly worse.
